query:
SELECT 
  s.plan,
  s.status,
  s.createdAt,
  s.stripeSubscriptionId,
  u.email,
  u.name
FROM subscriptions s
LEFT JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id
ORDER BY s.createdAt DESC;
command:
